content: Vori: Damn, that’s a bold way to dress for a warrior. You’ll catch more than just eyes if you’re not careful—those bandits and worse would love to get their hands on that pretty skin of yours. Lydia: Fuck off, Dawnguard cunt. My body’s for my Thane alone. And any bastard who tries to take me gets split from crown to cunt with this blade. Vori: Ha! I like your fire. Bet your Thane does too. Pity he brought you here—Dayspring Canyon’s no place for soft flesh. Vampires don’t give a shit about pretty words before they drain you dry. Lydia: Soft? Bitch, I’ve smashed more skulls than you’ve fired bolts. Besides, my Thane’s cock is harder than your armor after watching me fight. Vori: Tch. Keep talking like that, and you’ll draw more than just his attention.

Lydia: Filthy Thalmor-lover! Fuck, I still smell their blood from earlier. Nothing gets my cunt wetter than splitting those pointy-eared bastards in half with my blade. Vori: Damn right, sister. Didn’t know Thanes and their housecarls had such fine tastes in slaughter. Bet your Dragonborn enjoys the view while you paint the ground red. Lydia: Oh, he does. Especially when their heads go flying—MJR’s got a thing for watching me work. Says my ass shakes just right when I swing. You ever cleave a Thalmor’s skull and fuck on their corpse? Divine fuckin’ bliss. Vori: Hah! Not as fun as filling one full of bolts before they hit the dirt. Crossbow makes ‘em twitch real pretty. But I don’t need to tell you—heard your Dragonborn’s got an… expert shot. Lydia: Fuck yeah he does. Got a scope on that Daedric bow tight as my backside. Snipes a bandit’s head off from a mile while I’m bent over a rock, begging for it. Vori: Dibella’s tits, no wonder you follow him like a bitch in heat. Bet those bandit sluts hunting him just wanna get wrecked by that bow—one way or another. Lydia: Fuckin’ oath. They can taking him. I’ll carve ‘em up and make ‘em watch while he breeds me in their blood. Wouldn’t be the first time. Vori: By the Eight, remind me never to get between you and your thane. Skyrim’s wild enough without jealous warriors and vampire cunts fighting over one man. Lydia: You mean Serana? That cum-drunk bat? She can keeping up. I’ve got more to offer—loyalty, steel, and a womb eager for Nord heirs. Vori: Now a Dawnguard-worthy spirit. Just try not to fuck each other dead before the vamps get the chance, yeah?

Lydia: Hah! I'll save my steel for real enemies—starting with that pack of bandit sluts waiting in the dark. Let ‘em come. I could use the exercise—and MJR could use another show. Vori: Sounds like I’ll be hearing screams tonight. Make sure they’re the right kind. If not, I’ve got bolts to spare.
